title: jasminum nervosum var. villosum
intro: Jasminum nervosum var. villosum, also known as the hairy jasmine or climbing jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the nervous system. The herbal preparations of Jasminum nervosum var. villosum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
